title: Ventura County SFR in Very-High FHSZ — should be rejected at intake (CBC Ch. 7A out of pilot)
project_address: 8520 Box Canyon Rd, Ventura County (unincorporated), CA 93063
notes: Ventura's biggest unincorporated risk category. Classifier should mark out_of_scope on VHFHSZ + Ch. 7A cues.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 8520 BOX CANYON RD, VENTURA COUNTY UNINCORPORATED
Parcel is in a CalFire designated Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zone (VHFHSZ)
WUI construction required per CBC Chapter 7A
Proposed: new single-family residence
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 2
Total building area: 3,400 sf
Defensible space plan per Ventura County FPD Chapter 49
Ignition-resistant exterior assemblies — schedule on A-7.0
